title: echites longiflorus
intro: Echites longiflorus, also known as the snake vine or devil's horsewhip, is a plant species in the dogbane family Apocynaceae. The medicinal properties of Echites longiflorus include its ability to reduce fever, treat snake and insect bites, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits associated with this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to heal wounds and prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Echites longiflorus typically involve the roots and stems being dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
